subject: Your mentor profile is in review
html:
Reviews are done by hand and usually take about a week
In review
Thanks {{first_name}} — your profile has been submitted for review. Reviews are done by hand and usually take about a week; we'll email you the moment it's done.
While you wait, the mentor FAQ covers how requests, payments and free mentoring work. Haven't heard from us after a week or so? Write to hello@openmentor.io — something may have gone astray.
openmentor.io · free mentorship for the tech community
text:
Hi {{first_name}},

Your profile has been submitted for review. Reviews are done by hand and usually take about a week; we'll email you the moment it's done.

While you wait, the mentor FAQ covers how requests, payments and free mentoring work:
https://openmentor.io/faq#mentors

Haven't heard from us after a week or so? Write to hello@openmentor.io — something may have gone astray.

---
openmentor.io · free mentorship for the tech community
https://openmentor.io
